title: OREGON LAW HELP WEBSITE - 211info
text: OREGON LAW CENTER PORTLAND REGIONAL OFFICE OREGON LAW HELP WEBSITE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Website offers legal information regarding various issues, including housing, family law, employment law, elder law, government benefits, and consumer protection. Provides links to legal service providers, resources, and a directory of legal aid providers. 621 SW Morrison Street Suite 1450 Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: Some links and resources on website are available in English, Spanish, Russian, Vietnamese, Chinese, French, Korean, Mandarin Chinese, Somali AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm Services: Comprehensive Family Law Services Consumer Protection Agencies Elder Law Emergency Related Eviction/Foreclosure Moratoriums Eviction Prevention Assistance General Legal Aid Labor and Employment Law Law Enforcement Community Engagement/Outreach Legal Information Services Tenant Rights Information/Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER SERVICES - OREGON LAW CENTER TAX CLINIC LEGAL SERVICES - EVICTION DEFENSE PROJECT MULTNOMAH COUNTY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON LAW CENTER PORTLAND REGIONAL OFFICE
